### Issue URL (Ads) [https://yandex.ru/search/?from=chromesearch&text=%D0%90%D0%BB%D0%B8%D1%81%D0%B0+%D0%BA%D0%B0%D0%BA+%D1%8E%D1%80%D0%B8%D1%81%D1%82&lr=213](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fyandex.ru%2Fsearch%2F%3Ffrom%3Dchromesearch%26text%3D%25D0%2590%25D0%25BB%25D0%25B8%25D1%2581%25D0%25B0%2B%25D0%25BA%25D0%25B0%25D0%25BA%2B%25D1%258E%25D1%2580%25D0%25B8%25D1%2581%25D1%2582%26lr%3D213) ### Comment > Последнее время в поиске Яндекса стало появляться очень много результатов в первых строчках выдачи с пометкой «Промо». Иногда доходит до абсурда и первые 5 результатов это могут быть вот такие рекламные ссылки ``` Username: @aturtsev ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/os7stn9mkg00k4c408c40c08c000s0cq3i6tq1ng00.png?nc=1)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.title: www.advnture.com

labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

labels.name: A: Problematic
labels.description: Issues, which cannot be resolved easily

pinned_comment.body:
Please use another fork website.
AdGuard decided to not handle these websites (pattern: `sbxh[0-9]+\.com`) because the website is one of fork websites about NewToki (pattern: `newtoki[0-9]+\.com`) and the websites have very lower traffic than NewToki.

This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

comment.body:
The live stream works fine on my end. However, I can't check it out like in the screenshot as a paid account is required. Which filter causes it? Try to leave only these filters, update them, clear browser data, restart it. If you still have it, disable them one by one to find a problematic one.
```
AdGuard Base filter
AdGuard Russian filter
AdGuard German filter
AdGuard Japanese filter
AdGuard Dutch filter
AdGuard Spanish/Portuguese filter
AdGuard French filter
ABPVN List
```

issue.title: Submit phishing websites disguised as the ToDesk, Huorong and WPS official website

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

Search "ToDesk" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`cn-todesks.com.cn` (as `www.cn-todesks.com.cn`)
`work-todesk.com.cn`
`todesk.cn.com`
`h-todesk.com.cn`
`pc-todesktk.com.cn` (as `www.pc-todesktk.com.cn`)
`of-todesk.com`
`todisk-app.com.cn` (with spelling `todisk` rather than `todesk`)
`win-todesk.com.cn`
`gf-todesk.com.cn`
Suggestion: ban all `-todesk.com.cn`, `-todesks.com.cn` and `-todesktk.com.cn` endfix.
(like WPS, but there are also phishing websites here that don't end with these endfixes.).

Search "火绒" (Huorong in Chinese, an antivirus software) with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`pc-huorong.com.cn`
`ch-huorong.cn`
`huorong-sf.com.cn`
`zh-huorong.com.cn`
`huorong-pc.com.cn`
`win-huorong.com.cn`
`huorongapp.com.cn`
Suggestion: ban all `-huorong.com.cn` and `-huorong.cn` endfix.
(like WPS, but there are also phishing websites here that don't end with these endfixes.).

Search "WPS" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`wps-wpspc.com`
(other WPS phishing sites already blocked by `-wps.com.cn^`)

These phishing websites have done SEO, so they are easy to find on Bing search and rank higher than the real official websites.
Official PC site of ToDesk is `www.todesk.com`, official Chinese-language site of Huorong is `www.huorong.cn`, official Chinese-language site of WPS Office is `www.wps.cn` (`www.wps.com` for international).
These phishing websites may check referer and reject access from anywhere else than search engines.

### Proposed solution

Ban these phishing websites.

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body:
> Suggestion: ban all `-todesk.com.cn`, `-todesks.com.cn` and `-todesktk.com.cn` endfix.

Antiphishing does not use adblock-style rules.

Blocked all domains.

issue.title: Submit phishing websites disguised as the ToDesk, Huorong and WPS official website

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

Search "ToDesk" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`cn-todesks.com.cn` (as `www.cn-todesks.com.cn`)
`work-todesk.com.cn`
`todesk.cn.com`
`h-todesk.com.cn`
`pc-todesktk.com.cn` (as `www.pc-todesktk.com.cn`)
`of-todesk.com`
`todisk-app.com.cn` (with spelling `todisk` rather than `todesk`)
`win-todesk.com.cn`
`gf-todesk.com.cn`
Suggestion: ban all `-todesk.com.cn`, `-todesks.com.cn` and `-todesktk.com.cn` endfix.
(like WPS, but there are also phishing websites here that don't end with these endfixes.).

Search "火绒" (Huorong in Chinese, an antivirus software) with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`pc-huorong.com.cn`
`ch-huorong.cn`
`huorong-sf.com.cn`
`zh-huorong.com.cn`
`huorong-pc.com.cn`
`win-huorong.com.cn`
`huorongapp.com.cn`
Suggestion: ban all `-huorong.com.cn` and `-huorong.cn` endfix.
(like WPS, but there are also phishing websites here that don't end with these endfixes.).

Search "WPS" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`wps-wpspc.com`
(other WPS phishing sites already blocked by `-wps.com.cn^`)

These phishing websites have done SEO, so they are easy to find on Bing search and rank higher than the real official websites.
Official PC site of ToDesk is `www.todesk.com`, official Chinese-language site of Huorong is `www.huorong.cn`, official Chinese-language site of WPS Office is `www.wps.cn` (`www.wps.com` for international).
These phishing websites may check referer and reject access from anywhere else than search engines.

### Proposed solution

Ban these phishing websites.

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body:
ok，这两天必应又有新的银狐木马钓鱼域名了：
`todeisk.com.cn`
`todeskkb.com`（`www.todeskkb.com`）
`todesku.com.cn`
`todeskx.com`

`huorongsafety.com.cn`
`huoronbc.com`

`wps-editor.com`

还有伪造卡巴的：
`www.cn-kaspersky.com.cn` （`cn-kaspersky.com.cn`）
`kaspersky.hl.cn`

望核实。

issue.title: Submit phishing websites disguised as the ToDesk, Huorong and WPS official website

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

Search "ToDesk" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`cn-todesks.com.cn` (as `www.cn-todesks.com.cn`)
`work-todesk.com.cn`
`todesk.cn.com`
`h-todesk.com.cn`
`pc-todesktk.com.cn` (as `www.pc-todesktk.com.cn`)
`of-todesk.com`
`todisk-app.com.cn` (with spelling `todisk` rather than `todesk`)
`win-todesk.com.cn`
`gf-todesk.com.cn`
Suggestion: ban all `-todesk.com.cn`, `-todesks.com.cn` and `-todesktk.com.cn` endfix.
(like WPS, but there are also phishing websites here that don't end with these endfixes.).

Search "火绒" (Huorong in Chinese, an antivirus software) with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`pc-huorong.com.cn`
`ch-huorong.cn`
`huorong-sf.com.cn`
`zh-huorong.com.cn`
`huorong-pc.com.cn`
`win-huorong.com.cn`
`huorongapp.com.cn`
Suggestion: ban all `-huorong.com.cn` and `-huorong.cn` endfix.
(like WPS, but there are also phishing websites here that don't end with these endfixes.).

Search "WPS" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`wps-wpspc.com`
(other WPS phishing sites already blocked by `-wps.com.cn^`)

These phishing websites have done SEO, so they are easy to find on Bing search and rank higher than the real official websites.
Official PC site of ToDesk is `www.todesk.com`, official Chinese-language site of Huorong is `www.huorong.cn`, official Chinese-language site of WPS Office is `www.wps.cn` (`www.wps.com` for international).
These phishing websites may check referer and reject access from anywhere else than search engines.

### Proposed solution

Ban these phishing websites.

### Additional information

_No response_

comment.body:
已向Todesk确认，域名全部为伪冒（稍后上传截图）。  
已向火绒报告域名伪冒，正在等待回复。  
由于wps只有一个未屏蔽伪冒域名，故未作报告。

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
[https://www.alipayhk.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.alipayhk.com%2F)

> When trying to use online electronic payments apps with adguard dns enable payments apps fail to work correctly. solution for the problem is to exclude all electronic payments apps to prevent issues from happening example payment apps failing to work or make transactions all completely.

Canonical name when using DNS lookup is currently `tlz2cssgy8rqq289q1hdp9gxtx90.image-sap.sfmc-content.com`.

Can see that it is currently listed in [SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers.txt](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/d2c8d320f3ff94af9460d8ffa1b4949e41ffe428/SpywareFilter/sections/tracking_servers.txt): `||image-sap.sfmc-content.com^`

But this is preventing all images from being seen in all emails that are using Salesforce.

comment.body:
Sorry fellas, this given problem was caused by the Firefox extension "No Google Link Rewrite" (https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/no-google-link-rewrite-webexts/?utm_content=addons-manager-reviews-link&utm_medium=firefox-browser&utm_source=firefox-browser). Silly me.

Close the case.

P.S. Yet, the problem with AdGuard goes on - I still can't update desktop version. And no help from support.

issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

New change of tinyShield's build script for Apple Safari Extension user (made at 2026 Apr 21) is available.

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

e_search_queries=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.referrer=&stealth.user_agent=&stealth.x_client=true&stealth.dpi=true&stealth.third_party_cookies=180&stealth.disable_third_party_cache=true&stealth.block_third_party_auth=true&stealth.block_trackers=true&referrer=&scheme_version=3&adblocking.enabled=true&dns.timeout=2000)

comment.body:
Also replicable on iOS. Disabling DNS filtering allows the images to load in the Mail app instantly.

Canonical name when using DNS lookup is `tl0mk2bsblm8pr1h4n8wcqdjq4xm.image-sap.sfmc-content.com`.

Similar to #233756, blocking `image-sap.sfmc-content.com` looks to be preventing all images from being seen in all emails that are using Salesforce.

issue.title: Submit phishing websites disguised as the ToDesk, Huorong and WPS official website

labels.name: A: In progress
labels.description: Work on the issue is in progress

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] I checked the documentation and found no answer;
- [x] I checked to make sure that this issue has not already been filed;
- [x] This is not an ad/bug report.

### Problem description

Search "ToDesk" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`cn-todesks.com.cn` (as `www.cn-todesks.com.cn`)
`work-todesk.com.cn`
`todesk.cn.com`
`h-todesk.com.cn`
`pc-todesktk.com.cn` (as `www.pc-todesktk.com.cn`)
`of-todesk.com`
`todisk-app.com.cn` (with spelling `todisk` rather than `todesk`)
`win-todesk.com.cn`
`gf-todesk.com.cn`
Suggestion: ban all `-todesk.com.cn`, `-todesks.com.cn` and `-todesktk.com.cn` endfix.
(like WPS, but there are also phishing websites here that don't end with these endfixes.).

Search "火绒" (Huorong in Chinese, an antivirus software) with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`pc-huorong.com.cn`
`ch-huorong.cn`
`huorong-sf.com.cn`
`zh-huorong.com.cn`
`huorong-pc.com.cn`
`win-huorong.com.cn`
`huorongapp.com.cn`
Suggestion: ban all `-huorong.com.cn` and `-huorong.cn` endfix.
(like WPS, but there are also phishing websites here that don't end with these endfixes.).

Search "WPS" with Bing, these sites are phishing sites:
`wps-wpspc.com`
(other WPS phishing sites already blocked by `-wps.com.cn^`)

These phishing websites have done SEO, so they are easy to find on Bing search and rank higher than the real official websites.
Official PC site of ToDesk is `www.todesk.com`, official Chinese-language site of Huorong is `www.huorong.cn`, official Chinese-language site of WPS Office is `www.wps.cn` (`www.wps.com` for international).
These phishing websites may check referer and reject access from anywhere else than search engines.

### Proposed solution

Ban these phishing websites.

### Additional information

_No response_
